body: ## [4.0.6](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/compare/v4.0.5...v4.0.6) (2017-06-29) ### Bug Fixes * **store:** delay call to listener to prevent infinite loops (algolia/react-instantsearch#143) ([0af6651](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/0af6651))
